summary: ANDROID 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens show internal code name "Falcon" instead of the correct product name for the paired device
description_clean: Onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name for the paired device.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the onboarding screens or device pairing/connection screens.
Look for the displayed device name or product identifier.
expected: The onboarding screens should display the proper product name (e.g., "Poly Voyager Focus 2") for the paired device.
actual: The onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name.
